title: Bridge Essay: Past and Future Explanations for Depersonalization and Derealization Disorder: A

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Past and Future Explanations for Depersonalization and Derealization Disorder: A Role for Predictive Coding.** — Front Hum Neurosci. PMID: 35321264. DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2022.744487. Depersonalization (DP) and derealization (DR) refer to states of dissociation in which one feels asense of alienation in relation to one'sself and environment, respectively. Whilst transient episodes often diminish without treatment, chronic experiences of DP and DR may last for years, with common treatments lacking astrong evidence base for their efficacy.
